identity_baseline: A Martian padwar and Heliumite air-scout.
movement_language: Agile, tactical, and precise in combat.
stable_visual_summary: A Red Martian warrior and Heliumite air-scout characterized by an agile, tactical physical presence. He is visually defined by his transition from a skilled combatant utilizing specialized Martian swordsmanship to a disheveled prisoner in dungeon garb or gladiator attire. His silhouette is that of a functional, lethal fighter capable of high precision.
costume_signature: Prisoner or gladiator attire; disheveled dungeon garb.
personality: Distraught and driven by vengeance and honor regarding Dejah Thoris.
relationship_notes: Driven by connection to Dejah Thoris
continuity_constraints: Must maintain agile combat capabilities despite prisoner status.
Weaponry must reflect specialized Martian swordsmanship techniques.
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific age and exact physical dimensions.
Exact visual details of the "specialized weaponry."
